title: Abelardo De La Espriella, Trump-Backed Rightist, Headed for Win in Colombia
summary_full: A victory for Abelardo De La Espriella, a lawyer with no previous political experience, would be another win for the right in Latin America.
summary_public: A victory for Abelardo De La Espriella, a lawyer with no previous political experience, would be another win for the right in Latin America.
